title: GRIEF TRAVELERS - 211info
text: LIVING UNDONE GRIEF TRAVELERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an ongoing 4 week series for 6-10 participants with weekly 60 minute group sessions. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 223-9955 Main phone Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for an appointment or more information FEES: $25 per week. Sliding scale fee available.
